quotes.text: I've been coming to Quakes games for 15 years. Never seen one kid get the entire stadium on their feet like that. Absolute legend.
quotes.author: — Section 109, Season Ticket Holder

quotes.text: My son turned to me and said "Dad, I want to be THAT kid." Same, buddy. Same.
quotes.author: — Row F, Lower Bowl

quotes.text: The wave went around THREE times. I lost my voice and my nachos. Worth it.
quotes.author: — Upper Deck, Behind the Goal

quotes.text: That kid has more leadership in one arm wave than most people have in their entire body. Future captain energy.
quotes.author: — The 1906 Ultras Section

quotes.text: I was filming the game and completely switched to filming this kid. Best content of the night, no contest.
quotes.author: — Press Box Adjacent

quotes.text: Even the away fans stood up. You can't fight that kind of energy. You just join in.
quotes.author: — Visiting Supporter
